data.body:
## Description
Write failing test test_stale_red_marker_exit_zero in tests/hooks/test-record-test-status.sh. Create git repo fixture with source file, test file, .test-index entry with [marker]. Use RECORD_TEST_STATUS_RUNNER mock that exits 0. Invoke record-test-status.sh. Assert exit code non-zero and stderr contains STALE RED MARKER with test file and marker name.

## TDD Requirement
RED test: test_stale_red_marker_exit_zero must exist and fail.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test test_stale_red_marker_exit_zero exists and fails (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_stale_red_marker_exit_zero.*FAIL'
